issues.description: Condition missing required power check. Text states 'If this Character has 7000 power or more' but DSL uses Always condition. Should include a power threshold check.
Filter uses generic 'excludeSelf' but text specifically excludes '[Emporio.Ivankov]' by name. Should use exclusionList or cardName-based exclusion, not excludeSelf.
PlayFromHand action should include quantity constraint 'up to 1' explicitly in the action or as a limit parameter.
